title: UK's bold new crypto rules promise to unlock global trading, but huge compliance hurdles still threaten the rollout
summary: The U.K. FCA's crypto framework has been praised for prioritizing global liquidity and institutional adoption, but the authorization process is expected to be daunting.

title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
summary: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.

title: Bitcoin’s next parabolic run may need $1 trillion in fresh capital
summary: This cycle, about $697 billion in new money has generated a roughly 689% gain, compared with earlier cycles where far less capital drove returns of upto 50,000%.

title: This sanctioned Russian stablecoin claims it processes billions, but blockchain analysts disagree
summary: A7A5 claims crypto data providers understate its trading activity, while blockchain analytics firms say the ruble-backed token's volumes have fallen sharply this year.

title: Trump says there is ‘nothing wrong’ with family’s crypto windfall
summary: The president reported at least $1.4 billion in crypto income for 2025. He told CNBC he did nothing illegal and was not aware of the extent of his holdings. Critics say he is profiting from the office while his administration writes the industry's rules.
